assessor_1_raw: Clinical deterioration prediction: methodologically sound with temporal split, admission-level leakage prevention, and pre-registered minimum delta. Documentation frequency robustness check is important. ECE and subgroup AUROC address clinical deployment needs. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Strong clinical study design. LSTM with attention for irregular time series is the appropriate architecture. The composite outcome is clinically justified. Subgroup and temporal stratification are comprehensive confound controls. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Well-designed clinical AI experiment. The 4-hour minimum observation filter is clinically appropriate. Palliative exclusion is correct. DeLong's test with pre-registered minimum delta is rigorous. No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: All three assessors unanimous: defense_wins across all runs.
